---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error, typo, or inaccuracy in the guide
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Location of the Bug**
- **Folder:** [e.g., Chapter-2-Routing]
- **File:** [e.g., ospf-configuration.md]

**Describe the Bug**
A clear and concise description of the error, typo, or technical inaccuracy you found.

**Proposed Solution or Fix**
Please describe the solution, provide the correct command/text, or explain how to fix the issue.
